audit_items.proof_trace: The FlowController class in flow_controller.h contains zero pointer dereferences: all five data members are value types (bool, volatile int), all method parameters are value types, and the only address-of operation (&_read_quota, &_write_quota) takes the address of a member variable on a live object—not a pointer dereference. The property holds trivially because the precondition 'ptr deref exists' is never satisfied within this file.
